AYUDA: This is what we call the Zygarde: AYUDA: This is what we call the Zygarde Grid.
Are you familiar with the Pokémon Zygard: Are you familiar with the Pokémon Zygarde?
AYUDA: Aha, then I'll spare you details.
Recently we've found fragments of Zygard: Recently we've found fragments of Zygarde all around the Aevium Region.
My goal is to restore Zygarde to its rig: My goal is to restore Zygarde to its rightful form.
But I'm so cooped up in my lab that I'm: But I'm so cooped up in my lab that I'm not sure if I can...
That's why I was at Venam's gym. To reco: That's why I was at Venam's gym. To recon and recruit possible candidates to collect Zygarde Cells on their journey.
Zygarde is part of a trio of Legendary P: Zygarde is part of a trio of Legendary Pokémon native to the Kalos Region.
It is comprised of hundreds of smaller c: It is comprised of hundreds of smaller cells that form a bigger being.
Its purpose is to protect the ecosystem: Its purpose is to protect the ecosystem and maintain balance within the world.
You won't be able to see these cells wit: You won't be able to see these cells without that Gather Cube I gave you earlier.
AYUDA: It's the cube-like item in your b: AYUDA: It's the cube-like item in your bag...
AYUDA: There are 150 cells we've located: AYUDA: There are 150 cells we've located. Each cell you collect will automatically return to our grid.
Normally only 100 cells are required to: Normally only 100 cells are required to bring together a full Zygarde, but our machine is considerably weak.
Additionally, we're going to need 5 core: Additionally, we're going to need 5 cores to hold the cells together, but I wouldn't worry about that.
Of course, I would not put you on this h: Of course, I would not put you on this huge task without a reward!
Please return once you've collected 5 ce: Please return once you've collected 5 cells.
